findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'process components - water use' (3x).

findings.description: Flow Regime Changes bar chart (Stream Condition Middle Deep River, Node 280) is not preserved as a visual graphic. The chart is replaced by extracted text values and bullet-point legend items.
findings.evidence: PDF page 15 shows a grouped bar chart comparing % of Days at Flow Level across Unimpaired, 2003, 2030, and 2050 Demands with color-coded QAA percentage ranges. The HTML renders only the axis labels (35.0%, 30.0%, etc.), category labels ('Unimpaired | 2003 Demands | 2030 Demands | 2050 Demands'), and legend entries as bullet points — no chart image is present.

findings.description: Project Organization Venn diagram is missing from the HTML. The three overlapping circles showing relationships between Data Collection (HDR), Model Development (HydroLogics), and Data/Model Evaluation & Plan Development (NCDWR) are replaced by plain-text bullet points.
findings.evidence: PDF page 19 shows a Venn diagram with three overlapping circles conveying the interrelationships among the three project roles. The HTML lists these as flat bullet points ('Data Collection HDR', 'Model Development HydroLogics', 'Data, Model Evaluation & Plan Development NCDWR') with no diagram image, losing the visual representation of overlap and collaboration.

findings.description: The body text content of the 'Why Need River Basin Plans' slide (PDF page 2) is missing from the HTML text body. The key bullet points ('Sustainable management', 'Reliable, quantitative methods for planning', 'Objective management and regulatory decision making') and the subheading 'Water Resources Plans support' are only paraphrased inside an image alt attribute, not rendered as readable HTML text.
